prompt: Create a high-impact anime concert illustration of a cool female idol singer performing on a dark futuristic stage, shown from a dramatic low-angle close-up with dynamic foreshortening. She has long flowing black hair with violet-blue highlights, intense purple eyes, pale skin, and a confident cool expression as she sings into a black handheld microphone. Her right hand reaches toward the viewer with spread fingers, creating strong depth and energy. Dress her in a glossy black and sapphire-blue gothic rock idol outfit: cropped black top, short layered asymmetrical skirt, studded belt, thigh straps, sheer sleeves, metallic chains, star-shaped ornaments, crystal accessories, dangling earrings, and sharp jeweled hairpieces. Surround her with dazzling blue-violet stage lighting, laser beams, reflective diamond shards, floating crystal fragments, glittering particles, and large faceted LED panels in the background. Use a saturated electric blue, indigo, black, and silver palette with strong rim lighting, sparkling highlights, lens flares, motion in the hair and fabric, intricate jewelry detail, and a polished ultra-detailed modern anime art style. The composition should feel like an explosive live performance moment, glamorous, sharp, cool, and cinematic, with high contrast and crisp luminous reflections.
